project: crawl_agent - LangChain Web Archive Analysis Agent

steps.description: Create project root .venv and install all dependencies (langchain, langchain-openai, warcio, beautifulsoup4, lxml, pydantic)
steps: Run: python3 -m venv .venv
Run: source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r crawl_agent/requirements.txt
Verify: python -c 'import langchain; import warcio; import bs4; print("OK")'

steps.description: Create crawl_agent/ package with __init__.py and requirements.txt
steps: Create crawl_agent/__init__.py
Create crawl_agent/requirements.txt with: langchain>=0.3.0, langchain-openai>=0.3.0, langchain-core>=0.3.0, pydantic>=2.0, warcio>=1.7, beautifulsoup4>=4.12, lxml>=5.0

steps.description: Implement config.py: load env file, define path constants, get_available_dates(), get_consecutive_pairs()
steps: Read project root 'env' file to get GLM_ENDPOINT, GLM_API_KEY, GLM_MODEL_NAME
Define PROJECT_ROOT, COLLECTIONS_DIR, COMPARE_SCRIPT_DIR, REPORTS_DIR, CACHE_DIR
Implement get_available_dates() scanning crawls/collections/
Implement get_consecutive_pairs() yielding adjacent date pairs (skip gaps like 0322->0324)
Verified: 23 dates, 21 consecutive pairs found

steps.description: Implement cache.py: JSON-based WARC parse cache with checksum validation
steps: Implement get_parsed_collection(date_str, extract_text) with cache-first logic
Cache location: crawl_agent/.cache/parsed/{date}.json
Implement checksum validation (WARC filenames + sizes SHA-256)
Delegate actual parsing to crawl_compare.parse_warc_collection()
Verify: cache a single collection and check .cache/ directory exists with valid JSON

steps.description: Implement warc_loader.py: thin wrapper importing compare_script functions with cache layer
steps: sys.path.insert(0, COMPARE_SCRIPT_DIR) to import from compare_script
Implement get_collection_data(date_str)
Implement compare_two_dates(old, new)
Implement get_text_diff_for_url(url, old, new)
Implement get_domains_for_date(date_str)
Implement get_page_content(url, date_str)
Verify: compare_two_dates('20260315', '20260316') returns non-empty result

steps.description: Implement llm_client.py: ChatOpenAI wrapper for GLM-5.1 via OpenAI-compatible API
steps: Create get_llm(temperature=0.1) returning ChatOpenAI with base_url=GLM_ENDPOINT
Add rate-limit sleep wrapper (configurable delay)
Verify: get_llm().invoke('hello') returns a response

steps.description: Implement prompts.py: system prompt, analysis prompt, interactive prompt templates
steps: Write SYSTEM_PROMPT: web archive analyst persona for AI coding tools
Write ANALYSIS_PROMPT: structured template for batch mode (date, stats, domain breakdown, changes)
Write INTERACTIVE_SYSTEM_PROMPT: for agent mode with tool usage guidance
Include change classification: new feature / pricing / design / docs / blog / infrastructure

steps.description: Implement tools.py: 6 LangChain @tool definitions with Pydantic schemas
steps: compare_dates(old_date, new_date) -> domain-grouped summary
get_page_changes(url, old_date, new_date) -> detailed text diff
get_domain_changes(domain, old_date, new_date) -> filtered by domain
list_available_dates() -> all crawl dates
analyze_trend(domain, start_date, end_date) -> time series
search_changes(keyword, date?) -> keyword search
Verify: list_available_dates() returns 23+ dates

steps.description: Implement batch.py: CLI batch processor for all consecutive date pairs
steps: Implement run_batch() with date pair iteration
Load cached data -> compare -> build prompt -> call LLM -> write report
Truncate to top 30 most significant changes per pair
Rate limit delay between LLM calls (configurable)
Skip existing reports by default, --force to override
LLM error handling: 3 retries with exponential backoff
Verify: run on single pair (20260315 vs 20260316) and check reports/ output

steps.description: Implement agent.py: interactive LangChain ReAct agent with REPL
steps: Create agent with create_react_agent(llm, tools, prompt)
REPL loop: user input -> agent reasoning -> tool calls -> response
Configure max_iterations=10, handle_parsing_errors=True
Verify: start agent and ask 'list available dates'

steps.description: Implement main.py: CLI entry point dispatching batch/agent modes
steps: argparse with subcommands: batch, agent
batch: --start-date, --end-date, --delay, --force, --output
agent: no special args
Verify: python crawl_agent/main.py --help shows both modes

steps.description: End-to-end verification: batch mode produces correct reports, agent mode answers queries
steps: Run batch on 20260315-20260316 pair - SUCCESS: report generated with all sections
Report verified: Executive Summary, Statistics (15207/14823 URLs), Domain Breakdown, Significant Changes (Cursor pricing, OpenClaw docs, Replit gallery), Trend Analysis
Stats match expected: 2529 added, 2913 removed, 1807 changed, 31 text changes
